scripts.check: bun install && bun run flow && bun --bun prettier --check **/*.js **/*.jsx *.js *.jsx && bun run check:licenses
scripts.check:clean: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run flow && bun --bun prettier --check **/*.js **/*.jsx *.js *.jsx && bun run check:licenses
scripts.check:licenses: TEMP=$(mktemp); find node_modules -name package.json -exec jq 'if (.license | type) == "string" then .license else empty end' {} + | sort -u > "$TEMP"; if DIFFERENCES=$(grep -Fvxf ../../allowed-licenses.txt "$TEMP"); then echo '\033[0;31mLicense found in node_modules that is not in allowed-licenses.txt' >&2; echo "$DIFFERENCES"; exit 1; fi
